title: Rich Polish Black Beans Dumplings
description: Dense, umami-packed dumplings made from fermented black beans and a buttery dough, served with a drizzle of smoked butter and a sprinkle of fresh dill.

ingredients.name: soft butter
ingredients.notes: for serving, melted with a pinch of smoked salt

instructions: In a bowl, mix the fermented black beans, smoked paprika, black pepper, and smoked salt until well combined.
In a separate bowl, whisk the flour and 5g of salt. Add softened butter and warm water, mixing until a smooth dough forms; it should be slightly sticky.
Fold the bean mixture into the dough, ensuring even distribution. Knead the dough for 2–3 minutes until elastic.
Divide the dough into 12 equal portions and roll each into a 4cm ball. Gently press each ball with a fork to create a shallow indented center.
Place dumplings on a parchment-lined tray and let them rest for 10 minutes to firm up.
Heat a large pot of salted water to a gentle boil. Drop dumplings in, cooking for 12–14 minutes until they rise and the dough firms up.
Remove with a slotted spoon, drizzle each dumpling with melted soft butter (seasoned with a pinch of smoked salt), and sprinkle chopped dill on top.
Serve hot as a hearty, umami-rich dinner.
